overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in a white coat exploring an abandoned indoor facility overgrown with lush vegetation and flowering trees. The character walks through a serene garden courtyard with red benches, pauses to look up at the canopy, then turns into a darker industrial corridor with green-tinted lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor garden courtyard with red benches and flowering trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the overgrown courtyard toward the tree-lined path

notable_agents.action: sitting on red bench facing away from the path
walking away from camera into the distance along the left wall

entered.detail: bright red metal bench along the right side of the path
raised concrete planter with dark bushes and flowering plants
tree with pink blossoms and dense green leaves
tall leafy tree with thick trunk and dense canopy
elevated metal walkway with railings on the upper level of the facility
grey concrete walls and structural columns of the abandoned facility

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an indoor garden courtyard with dense vegetation and flowering trees. A red bench sits on the right where an NPC is seated, while another NPC walks away in the distance on the left. The environment features industrial concrete walls and an elevated metal walkway above.

scene_state.functional_zone: view of indoor tree canopy and overhead lighting

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the tree canopy and overhead lighting
camera tilts back down to forward-facing position

agents.ego_description: pausing to look up at the tree canopy and artificial lighting above before continuing

entered.detail: dense overhead canopy of leaves and branches filling the upper frame
rectangular light panels and metal beams in the ceiling above the trees

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal the dense tree canopy and overhead lighting fixtures above, showing the contrast between the natural overgrowth and the industrial ceiling structure. The red bench and planter pass out of view as the character moves forward beneath the trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor with green-lit glass walls

events.description: character turns left toward the industrial corridor
enters darker industrial area with prominent green lighting from side rooms

agents.ego_description: turning left and walking through dense foliage into an industrial corridor with green-tinted glass walls

entered.detail: glass walls emitting eerie green light from the side rooms
stacked cardboard boxes and debris on the left side
industrial metal pillars supporting the upper walkway structure
dark corridor extending into the distance with industrial machinery visible

segments.scene_description: The character turns left into a narrower industrial corridor, passing through dense tree branches. The environment transitions to a darker area with distinctive green-lit glass walls on the left and industrial metal structures. The path leads deeper into the facility with cardboard boxes and debris scattered near the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a lush indoor garden that gradually transitions into a dim, industrial corridor. It begins with the character walking through a courtyard filled with dense vegetation and flowering trees, passing a red bench and a distant figure beneath elevated metal walkways. As the character moves forward, the camera tilts upward to reveal the contrast between the thick overhead canopy and the industrial ceiling fixtures before the greenery begins to fade from view. The scene then shifts as the character turns left, pushing through dense branches to enter a narrower passage. Finally, the environment opens into a darker facility area characterized by green-lit glass walls and scattered debris.
